patch.value: Daily Release fails at changelog:check — version-format mismatch (padded tag vs npm version)

Root cause: release.yml 'decide' step emits tag=v2026.05.30 (zero-padded) but npm_version=2026.5.30 (npm-stripped). 'Generate changelog' rendered the heading from the padded tag (## 2026.05.30) while 'Run release checks'->changelog:check validates with --release-version-from-package (## 2026.5.30), so the check reported 'out of date' and the scheduled Daily Release went red 4 days running. pm-web is the only package with an unreleased pm item rendered under a version heading, so it was the only one to trip it. Fix: changelog generation in release.yml now uses --release-version-from-package (identical version source to the check), so they can never diverge regardless of tag padding. Verified by full local CI simulation (release:check rc=0, heading ## 2026.5.30).
